title: Fix duplicate declaration of member name

features.name: interface clocking block with default skew directive
features.description: Code should include an interface with a clocking block that uses the default input/output skew directive

features.name: interface clocking block with mixed direction signals
features.description: Code should include an interface clocking block with both input and inout signal declarations

features.name: interface with function and clocking block
features.description: Code should include an interface that contains both a function and a clocking block

features.name: virtual interface array in class with clocking block access
features.description: Code should include a class with a virtual interface array that accesses clocking block signals in a forever loop
